# KiwiHacks Nova

> Nova is a constellation of three free 24-hour hackathons for New Zealand high school students, run by KiwiHacks.

## Events

- **Wellington** — 28–29 September 2026
- **Christchurch** — 2–3 October 2026
- **Auckland** — 10–11 October 2026

## About

KiwiHacks Nova is open to all NZ high school students (years 9–13). No experience needed. Food, mentors, workshops, and swag are all free — cost is never a barrier at KiwiHacks.

KiwiHacks is New Zealand's first high school hackathon club, built and run entirely by teenagers.

## Pages

- / — Home (city selector)
- /wellington — Wellington event
- /christchurch — Christchurch event
- /auckland — Auckland event
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /team — The KiwiHacks team

- Website: https://kiwihacks.org
- Sign up: https://kiwihacks.fillout.com/nova

- Discord: https://kiwihacks.org/discord
